arts.ttl: Go Ahead Eagles: Adekanye and Amofa heading for the door
arts.sum: As per reports from Voetbal Internationals's Sander Janssen, Bobby Adekanye (25) and Jamal Amofa (26) look set to depart Go Ahead Eagles.

arts.ttl: Preview: Fortuna Sittard vs. Go Ahead Eagles - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's Eredivisie clash between Fortuna Sittard and Go Ahead Eagles, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
